capture_power.description: Enhances Capture Power when using spheres.

hunger_reduction.description: Makes the player less prone to hunger.

swim_speed.description: Increases the player's Swim Speed and reduces stamina depletion while swimming.

food_decay_reduction.description: Makes food in inventory less likely to spoil.

glider_speed.description: Increases the player's Glide Speed and reduces stamina depletion while gliding.

climb_speed.description: Increases the player's Climb Speed and reduces stamina depletion while climbing.

status_ailment_resist.description: Makes the player less prone to status conditions.

stamina_reduction.description: Reduces stamina depletion when running while mounted.

exp_bonus.description: Increases EXP gained. (Some Bonus EXP exceptions apply)

rainbow_passive_rate.description: Increases the chance of wild Pals having better passive skills.
